tools.name: list_tunnels
tools.description: List the user's Pipehero tunnels and whether each is currently online.

tools.name: list_requests
tools.description: List recent webhooks/requests captured for a tunnel. Returns id, method, path, status and bodies.

tools.name: get_request
tools.description: Get the full request and response (headers + body) of one captured webhook by id.

tools.name: replay_request
tools.description: Replay a captured webhook to the user's localhost (the tunnel CLI must be running).

tools.name: send_test_webhook
tools.description: Send a generated test webhook to the user's localhost (the tunnel CLI must be running). Provide a `provider` (stripe, github, shopify, clerk, slack, resend, paddle, polar, lemonsqueezy) and optional `event` for a realistic sample payload, or pass a custom JSON `body`. Pro plan required.
